narrative:
DRIVER
GBP leads H4 CSM at 100 with a 100-point D1-to-H4 divergence, the most critical short-term signal in this brief, driven by upbeat UK data against a mixed-low regime where USD fades on H4 CSM to 19. GBPUSD H4 sell signal conflicts directly with GBP H4 CSM dominance, but GBPJPY at +0.89 correlation to GBPUSD makes GBPJPY the cleaner long expression, amplified by JPY weakness on hawkish Fed bets and NZDJPY correlation at +0.82 pulling the yen complex lower. AUD D1 CSM at 100 fading to H4 57 flags AUDJPY as the highest-conviction carry with D1 strong buy and H4 momentum at 77 rising sharply.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: AUDJPY CMP 60 with H4 at 77 rising sharply, AUDUSD CMP 61 with D1 and H4 both rising
Fading: EURUSD CMP 41 with H4 momentum at 20 falling hard, GBPJPY CMP 43 with H4 at 44 dropping

WATCH
Trump-Xi summit resolution triggers risk repricing in AUDUSD, bullish break above current consolidation confirms D1 CSM alignment
US 2Y yield direction into next session directly drives USDJPY, a reversal higher confirms H4 momentum at 82 and extends JPY weakness
UK data follow-through hits EURGBP, downside acceleration there confirms GBP H4 CSM dominance over EUR H4 CSM at 38

themes.theme: US Dollar strength on hotter inflation and hawkish Fed expectations
Japanese Yen weakness amid escalating hawkish Fed bets
British Pound strength from upbeat UK economic data
Euro weakness and downside bias against USD
Trump-Xi summit outcome creating market uncertainty and positioning
Australian Dollar consolidation near support levels amid global uncertainty
New Zealand Dollar weakness from domestic economic risks
Indian Rupee pressure from foreign outflows and commodity tariff impacts
Risk-on sentiment from tech strength and equities rally

key_observation: US Dollar gaining strength on hotter inflation data and escalating hawkish Fed expectations, while risk appetite supported by tech sector strength. Trump-Xi summit appears constructive but outcome still being digested. GBP outperforming on UK data beats while JPY, NZD and INR under pressure. ECB potentially hawkish if oil surge threatens inflation.
watch: Trump-Xi summit final outcome and potential tariff implications. US Retail Sales data. ECB Lagarde comments. Further Fed hawkish repricing. Oil trend below 97 and implications for EM currencies and inflation expectations.
